title: Scheffler set to miss cut at Scottish Open
summary: Scottie Scheffler is set to miss the cut at the Genesis Scottish Open, ending a 78-tournament streak where the world No 1 has made it through to the weekend.

Image:
                        Scottie Scheffler struggled in the first two rounds of the Genesis Scottish Open

fullArticle:
Scottie Scheffler is set to miss the cut at the Genesis Scottish Open, ending a 78-tournament streak where the world No 1 has made it through to the weekend.
